company.name: S. Castillo Construction
company.description: Fine stucco, stone, and remodeling for discerning homeowners across the greater Houston area since 2000.

services.title: Fine Stucco
services.description: Traditional and modern stucco systems applied with precision — smooth, textured, or sculpted — engineered to endure Houston's demanding climate.

services.title: Natural Stone
services.description: Handset natural and manufactured stone for facades, columns, accent walls, and entryways that elevate a home's curb appeal and market value.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Premium coatings applied by experienced painters who understand surface preparation, weather protection, and lasting finish quality.

services.title: Full Remodeling
services.description: Complete interior and exterior remodels — kitchens, bathrooms, living spaces — executed with the same craftsmanship as our exterior work.

services.title: Residential
services.description: From custom new builds to estate renovations, we bring the same level of care to every home, regardless of project size.

services.title: Commercial
services.description: Hotels, retail centers, and office complexes trust S. Castillo to deliver commercial-grade finishing on schedule and to specification.

testimonial.text: S. Castillo transformed the exterior of our home completely. The craftsmanship was unlike anything we had seen — every detail was handled with care and professionalism. Our home looks like a million dollars.
testimonial.author: Satisfied Homeowner, The Woodlands, TX

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We visit your property, listen to your vision, and assess the scope of work — at no cost to you.

process.title: Custom Quote
process.description: You receive a detailed, transparent estimate with materials, timeline, and pricing — no surprises.

process.title: Craftsmanship
process.description: Our experienced crew executes the work with precision, keeping you informed at every stage.

process.title: Final Walkthrough
process.description: We walk the project with you before we consider it complete. Your satisfaction is the only standard that matters.
